_publications._publicationTitle: Glial-to-mesenchymal transition of tumor Schwann cells drives the genetic burden in MPNSTs from neurofibromatosis type 1 mouse model

_contextSnippet: On the basis of CNV analysis, 11 of 13 tumors presented deletions of portions of chromosome 4 covering Cdkn2a
details: 11 of 13 tumors presented deletions of portions of chromosome 4 covering Cdkn2a, making biallelic loss the most common genomic event in MPNSTs
